item.description:
## Plume 3.1.1
Patch release fixing layout issues spotted right after 3.1.0 shipped.
### Fixes
- **Edit mode**: the "Start writing…" hint now sits at the same baseline as the cursor (was rendering ~100 px below it). - **Preview pane**: now centered with comfortable margins on both sides (was anchored to the window's left edge with empty space on the right). - **Preview width**: bumped from 720 to 920 px max content width for more horizontal room on wide windows.
### From 3.1.0 (still applies)
Plume opens **multiple files at once** with `⌘T` (tabs) and `⌘N` (windows), and toggles a **rendered Markdown preview** with `⌘E` — headings, code with syntax highlighting, tables, footnotes, task lists, LaTeX math. Open windows and unsaved drafts come back on relaunch.
